channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mau Mau Survivors: Scars, Mass Graves and Embodied Memory as Archives of Colonial Violence in Kenya
item.description: Between 1952 and 1963, Kenya face one serious violent time during the Mau Mau uprising against British colonial rule. The thing start from land dispossession and political oppression, turn into full w...

item.description: On day 73 of the Madlanga commission of inquiry, North West businessman Suliman Carrim appeared to give testimony regarding his financial dealings and alleged associations. Carrim applied to present h...

item.title: High school students, teachers, and soldiers plant trees at Camp Manuel T. Yan, Sr. in Davao de Oro
item.description: On March 7, 2026, teachers and high school students from Tuboran National High School, together with soldiers from the Army’s 10th Infantry Division, planted over 700 tree seedlings around Camp Manuel...

item.title: KCMC to Open Dedicated Heart Treatment Unit in 2027 to Serve Northern Zone
item.description: Kilimanjaro Christian Medical Centre (KCMC) in Moshi, Kilimanjaro Region, is planning to open a specialised cardiac treatment unit in 2027 after an investment of over Sh25 billion. Currently, only Jak...

item.title: UK Clarifies Drone Attack on Cyprus Base Was Not Launched from Iran
item.description: On March 2, 2026, a drone struck the British Akrotiri Air Base in Cyprus, initially prompting suspicions that Iran was responsible. Early reports from an Israeli military correspondent suggested a pos...

item.title: Assessing the Real Impact of AI on Work and Productivity
item.description: The article examines the tangible effects of artificial intelligence (AI) on work in developed economies, cutting through the hype surrounding job losses and dramatic workplace transformation. Evidenc...

item.title: NTSA Launches Automated Instant Fines for Traffic Violations
item.description: The National Transport and Safety Authority (NTSA) has rolled out a new automated system for issuing instant fines to traffic offenders across Kenya. This system detects violations using smart cameras...

item.title: Reader Contributions and Opinions for the Week Starting 9 March
item.description: This week's edition of 'Your Say' on The Conversation highlights a range of reader contributions and perspectives on current topics. Barrie Verdin reflects on the discontinuation of talc powder by Joh...

item.title: Most Canadians Support Removing Prince Andrew from the Line of Succession
item.description: A recent poll by the Angus Reid Institute reveals that a significant majority of Canadians, including Prime Minister Mark Carney, believe Prince Andrew should be removed from the royal line of success...

item.title: Miami Dolphins Announce Release of Quarterback Tua Tagovailoa
item.description: The Miami Dolphins have officially decided to part ways with quarterback Tua Tagovailoa, as announced by general manager Jon-Eric Sullivan on March 9, 2026, coinciding with the start of the new NFL le...

item.title: Asian nations take emergency steps to manage fuel and energy shortages amid Iran tensions
item.description: Several Asian countries have implemented emergency measures to reduce energy consumption following disruptions in fuel supply and rising global oil prices, triggered by the conflict in West Asia. Bang...

item.title: Government announces austerity measures including online education, school holidays, and reduced workweek to save fuel
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Monday declared several austerity measures to deal with the global fuel crisis caused by the US-Israel conflict with Iran. Official vehicle fuel allowances will be hal...

item.title: Tinubu and First Lady Celebrate Pastor Adeboye on His 84th Birthday
item.description: President Bola Tinubu and First Lady Oluremi Tinubu don hail Pastor Enoch Adeboye, General Overseer of the Redeemed Christian Church of God (RCCG), as one of Nigeria's major gifts as he don turn 84. F...

item.title: Challenges and Solutions for Vaccination in Nigeria's Rural Communities
item.description: According to Patrick Chimuanya Etus, many parents for rural Nigeria dey willing make dem pikin dem get vaccine, but wahala dey mainly because of structural challenges. Long distance to health centres,...

item.title: Sarnia Legionnaires complete GOHL season without a win
item.description: The Sarnia Legionnaires, a junior B hockey team in the Greater Ontario Hockey League (GOHL), endured a historically difficult season, finishing with a record of 0 wins and 50 losses. Their final game,...

item.title: Zamfara Governor Joins APC, Party Chieftains Express Support
item.description: Na big matter don happen for Zamfara State as the state governor, Dauda Lawal, don officially join the All Progressives Congress (APC). APC chieftain Sani Abdullahi Shinkafi, wey be former governorshi...

item.title: Police Officers Seek Dismissal of Baby Pendo Murder Charges in High Court
item.description: Four senior police commanders implicated in the 2017 murder of six-month-old Baby Samantha Pendo during post-election violence in Kisumu's Nyalenda estate have filed an application at the High Court t...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Maasai Names and Their Meanings
item.description: This article provides an in-depth look at Maasai names and their cultural significance. In the Maasai community, names are carefully chosen to reflect personal attributes, birth circumstances, events,...

item.title: Survey Reveals Motivations and Trends in UK Will-Making
item.description: A recent survey by Great Ormond Street Hospital Charity (Gosh Charity) highlights that while many Britons aspire to leave a lasting legacy, a large proportion have yet to formalise their wishes throug...

item.title: Sahibzada Farhan Named in ICC T20 World Cup 2026 Team of the Tournament Despite Pakistan's Early Exit
item.description: The International Cricket Council (ICC) has announced its official Team of the Tournament for the 2026 Men’s T20 World Cup, held recently with India emerging as champions after defeating New Zealand i...
